name: Qualified Domestic Trust (QDOT) Election

eligibility.description: Requires at least one U.S. trustee, specific withholding rights for the trustee, and an irrevocable election by the executor.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Enables the marital deduction for property passing to a non-U.S. citizen spouse if the property is placed in a qualified trust with a U.S. trustee.
